definition: Distraction through uncertainty, wavering, and indecisive doubt about the path or practice.
notes: Project preference is uncertain distraction within the nīvaraṇa framework because it keeps the family resemblance to the other distractions visible. Doubt remains acceptable in explanatory prose where the simpler, familiar term is enough.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose emphasizing indecision or lack of confidence
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when the practical uncertainty is already clear.

example_phrases.notes: Standard member of the fivefold list.
Useful contrastive expression for the resolution of the condition.
